description_long: This is a rectangular wooden chopping board with a smooth, polished surface and a natural wood grain pattern. The board features a series of small, evenly spaced holes on one side, possibly for drainage or decorative purposes. On top of the board, there are three pieces of cooked chicken drumsticks and two slices of brown bread, arranged loosely. The board has a cutout notch along one edge, likely serving as a handle or grip for easy lifting. The wood appears to be of medium thickness, providing a sturdy and durable cutting surface. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no visible stains or food residue.
description: A rectangular wooden chopping board with a cutout handle, small holes, and food items (chicken drumsticks and bread) placed on top.
description_view_0: The board is seen from above, showing the chicken drumsticks and bread slices clearly, with the cutout handle and holes visible on the right.
description_view_1: Viewed from the side with the cutout handle facing forward, the bread slice is closest to the viewer and the chicken drumsticks are grouped behind.
description_view_2: The board is viewed from the opposite long edge, with the bread slices on the left and the chicken drumsticks on the right.
description_view_3: The cutout handle is again visible, but now the bread slices are in the upper left corner and the chicken drumsticks are grouped in the center.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ob: Three chicken drumsticks and two slices of bread are placed on top of the chopping board.
